description: Style NoteUpdated Roman sandals have never looked this good. These sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts and skirts. Product DetailsSandal with gold shimmery forefoot straps which extend upto the ankle to form an ankle strap, fastened by a tang claspSmooth footbed with stitched detailing on the periphery of the footbedTextured rubber outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and an upraised heel in the shape of a flowerMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
